name: Modern Anime
description: A fusion of modern anime aesthetics with intricate details and high gloss finishes, reminiscent of RWBY and Princess Mononoke.

art_style.line_styles: Thin, precise lines with varied thickness for depth; detailed outlines emphasize character features and backgrounds.
art_style.inking_tools: Predominantly digital tools for crisp, clean lines, with occasional traditional brush strokes for texture.
art_style.shading_style: Soft cel shading combined with gradient overlays; highlights are glossy and reflective, creating a vibrant, polished look.
art_style.color_palette: Rich, saturated colors with a focus on jewel tones; contrasting colors enhance visual impact, while muted shades provide depth.
art_style.spot_colors: Neon accents for magical effects or highlights, like glowing eyes or energy weapons.
art_style.registration: Tight registration with minimal color bleed; layers should be well-aligned for a clean finish.
art_style.lettering_style: Bold, dynamic font for dialogue; casual handwritten styles for thoughts, maintaining readability.

character_style.head_to_body_ratio: 1:6, emphasizing stylized proportions typical of modern anime.
character_style.limb_proportions: Long and slender limbs to reflect elegance and agility, with exaggerated hand and foot sizes for dramatic effect.
character_style.anatomy_detail: Semi-realistic anatomy with exaggerated features; focus on expressive faces and fluid forms.
character_style.eye_style: Large, expressive eyes with detailed irises and highlights; vibrant colors to convey emotion.
character_style.nose_style: Simple, stylized noses for a clean look; minimal detail to maintain focus on eyes and expressions.
character_style.mouth_style: Simple curves with occasional detail for smiles; expressive when conveying emotion.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: High, with exaggerated facial features to amplify emotional responses.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: Very high; characters should stand out against backgrounds with distinct outlines.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Angular shapes for dynamic poses combined with rounded features for friendliness.
character_style.detail_complexity: Moderate to high; intricate clothing designs, armor details, and nature elements enhance visual storytelling.
character_style.texture_accents: Subtle textures like fabric weaves and armor reflections; use of gradient fills for hair and clothing.
character_style.motion_line_style: Stylized speed lines that enhance action sequences; blur effects for rapid movement.
character_style.expression_line_style: Use of sweat drops and blush marks to amplify emotions during key moments.
character_style.signature_motifs: Iconic hairstyles and costume elements that define character identities; signature weapons for main characters.
character_style.recurring_flourishes: Flourishes like sparkles around magical effects or action lines during intense moments.

chat.shape: Rounded rectangle with a slight tail for dialogue.
chat.border: Thin, solid line with a glossy finish.
chat.fill_color: Light gray for readability with soft white highlights.
chat.font: Bold and modern sans-serif for clarity.

whisper.shape: Softly rounded, cloud-like shape to convey softness.
whisper.border: Dotted line for a gentle appearance.

shout.shape: Jagged edges to convey intensity and urgency.
shout.border: Thick, bold line to stand out.
shout.font: Dynamic, angular font that conveys shouting.

thought.shape: Cloud-like with a small tail pointing to the character's head.
thought.border: Thin, sketchy line for a dreamy effect.
thought.font: Casual script to reflect internal dialogue.

sound_effect.shape: Dynamic, explosive shapes like bursts or waves.
sound_effect.border: Bold, thick lines with a comic-book style.
sound_effect.fill_color: Bright colors like yellow or orange to grab attention.

narration.shape: Rectangular with slightly rounded corners for a clean look.
narration.border: Thin, elegant line to maintain simplicity.
narration.fill_color: White with a soft shadow for depth.
